disjointness_results.flag: Pressure range mismatch: turgor 0.1-1 MPa >> standard pressure-clamp ~7 kPa
EXCLUDE: Huang et al. 2018 ACS Synth Biol already used optogenetic c-di-GMP in biofilms
AFM nanoindentation of condensates active area with multiple published papers

Toyofuku et al. 2019 Nat Rev Microbiol — OMV review, selective cargo packaging unsolved

Balaban et al. 2019 Nat Rev Microbiol — definitions and phenotypes of persistence

Kapur et al. 2021 — ingestible electronics for GI monitoring review
Coyte et al. 2015 Science — microbiome community stability

literature_context_summary: Tool transfer creativity constraint produced 6 candidates. Literature verification: 3 DISJOINT (T1 cryo-EM x OMV, T3 FLIM x persisters, T6 EIS x gut microbiome), 2 PARTIALLY_EXPLORED (T2, T5), 1 WELL_EXPLORED excluded (T4 optogenetic biofilm). Three strong DISJOINT candidates available for selection.
